steps.title: Evaluate both functions
steps.content:
Substitute $x=5$ into each function before using the outside coefficient in the expression.
$$
f(5)=5+5=10
$$
$$
g(5)=4(5)=20
$$

steps.title: Use the full expression
steps.content: Now substitute those values into $7f(5)-g(5)$. $$ 7f(5)-g(5)=7(10)-20=70-20=50 $$ The answer is D.
